mapper.sql: s.id, s.category_id, s.name, s.description, s.price, s.original_price, s.duration, s.image, s.images, s.suitable_for, s.is_hot, s.status, s.sales, s.create_time, s.update_time, c.name as category_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM service_item s LEFT JOIN service_category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM service_item s LEFT JOIN service_category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.is_hot = 1 ORDER BY s.sales DESC LIMIT 6
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_item (category_id, name, description, price, original_price, duration, image, images, suitable_for, is_hot, status) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{duration}, #{image}, #{images}, #{suitableFor}, #{isHot}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE service_item SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE service_item SET sales = sales + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
